generic_name: Yogurt organic whole haymilk TSG - 170g - mango | curcuma
generic_name_de: Bio Joghurt mit Mango-Curcumazubereitung, aus pasteurisierter Heumilch g.t.S. (80%), mindestens 3,5% Fett im Milchanteil
generic_name_en: Yogurt organic whole haymilk TSG - 170g - mango | curcuma
generic_name_it: Yogurt biologico intero da latte fieno STG - 170g - mango | curcuma
ingredients_text: Yoghurt* 80%, mango and curcuma preparation 20% (mango puree* 10%, beet sugar*, tapioca starch*, lemon juice concentrate*, curcuma* 0.04%, thickener: locust bean gum*). Gluten free.*From organic farming.
ingredients_text_de:
_Joghurt_* 80%, Mango-Curcumazubereitung 20% (Mangopüree* 10%,  Rübenzucker*, Tapiokastärke*, Zitronensaftkonzentrat*, Curcuma* 0,04%, Verdickungsmittel: Johannisbrotkernmehl*). 
*aus biologischer Landwirtschaft.
ingredients_text_en: Yoghurt* 80%, mango and curcuma preparation 20% (mango puree* 10%, beet sugar*, tapioca starch*, lemon juice concentrate*, curcuma* 0.04%, thickener: locust bean gum*). Gluten free.*From organic farming.
ingredients_text_it: Yogurt intero* (latte* intero pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato al mango e curcuma 20% (purea di mango* 10% sul totale, zucchero di barbabietola*, amido di tapioca*, succo di limone da concentrato*, curcuma* 0,04% sul totale, gelificante: farina di semi di carrube*). Senza glutine.*da agricoltura biologica.
